project_type: Next.js 15 App Router frontend with Three.js particle entity
verification_instructions: Run pnpm build in /projects/sandbox/ChronAI/frontend - must complete without errors. Run pnpm lint for lint checks.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. DO NOT modify: backend/, mcp-servers/, shared/, hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, middleware.ts, components/Providers.tsx, components/entity/ directory, app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts, __mocks__/, __tests__/, jest.config.js, jest.setup.js
contribution_requirements: Frontend-only rebuild. Must pass pnpm build. Keep pnpm, Next.js app router structure. Keep all DO NOT MODIFY files intact.
key_patterns: CSS variables for theming (--bg, --surface, --text-primary etc), Framer Motion for animations with spring physics, Tailwind for styling, lucide-react icons, dark/light mode via .dark class, components/ui/ for reusable primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input, Modal, Toggle, Skeleton, EmptyState), layout via AppShell with Sidebar + TopBar, ChatExperience component owns WebSocket connection via useChatSocket hook
directory_structure: frontend/app/ - pages (layout.tsx, page.tsx, onboarding/, dashboard/ with calendar/tasks/habits/settings sub-routes). frontend/components/ - ui/ (primitives), layout/ (AppShell, Sidebar, TopBar), chat/ (AI chat panel), entity/ (Three.js DO NOT MODIFY), voice/ (VoiceMode). frontend/hooks/ (DO NOT MODIFY), frontend/lib/ (DO NOT MODIFY).
